alkylation reagent: alkylation was achieved by incubating in 5 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylation was achieved by incubating in 5 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: the D311N bands were in-gel digested with sequencing grade chymotrypsin
fragmentation method: higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) as a fragmentation method
instrument: Due to the high resolution of the Orbitrap mass spectrometer
